notes: Carey got a small caption workflow polish pass, and lego's local dice button now uses the simpler stem-focused caption pool that has been working better for lego tasks.
Lego, complete, and cover captions can now pop out into a compact editor so long ACE-Step prompts are readable while you keep rolling dice captions.
Complete no longer wears the warning badge, and the Carey guide now calls out the current lego xl-model findings plus the cover-nofsq backend notes.
Notarized VST3, AU, and Standalone DMGs are included.
Standalone is included, but gary4juce is still designed primarily around DAW workflows.
Close your DAW before replacing plugin files with a downloaded update.
